3018800.name: Mortalls
3018800.description:
Mortalls is a 3D Roguelite RPG set in a Dark Fantasy world with features of survivors and bullet hell-type games.

Before diving into the unknown, be sure to prepare yourself by upgrading stats or acquiring new upgrades that will increase your chances of surviving in the next run. Choose between multiple Classes with unique sets of Abilities, Passives, and much more. When in the game, collect as many Souls as you can to Level Up and be wary of potential Loot that may appear. After all, who doesn't like a chest full of gold and treasures?

Enemies are varied and each level will welcome you with different challenges, but one thing that they all have in common is that in the middle and end of a run, Bosses will come to hunt you. It is time to partake in the ongoing war between humans and the other world. Expect the unexpected and show them why humanity hasn't fallen yet. Show them who the monster really is!



- Features:
- More than hundred enemies at once
- Multiple synergies between upgrades-upgrades and upgrades-classes. Have you ever wondered what would happen if a fire and lightning ball fused?
- Each class has its own set of abilities providing tons of possibilities for different gameplay experiences and combos. Yes, this game has both close and long-range classes, and the differences don't stop there!
- Each run will be different even if just by a little due to the Mortalls wave spawning system. However, do not worry since what you learn in each try will be of utmost value in the next fights.
- Enemies have multiple purposes (Damage, Support, Defense, Impairment, etc), but Bosses take fights to a whole new level!
- Immersive gameplay: The environment of all maps impacts not only the gameplay but storytelling as well. From burning grounds to icy pavement, in the garden of a queen or at the backs of a giant marching towards its king.
- Accessibility Features: Be sure to check the menus for various features that can turn the default experience into a better one for you. You can tweak enemy stats, wave limit of enemies, UI elements, colors, visual effects, and much more.
- Go Beyond! Have a better computer than mine? Great, at your own caution and discretion bump the enemy numbers slider to the moon. Who knows what will happen?
3018800.supported_languages:
英语*, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙
*具有完全音频支持的语言
